{
  "task_id": "TASK-101",
  "title": "Implement User Authentication",
  "description": "Develop the authentication module for the IoT platform, enabling user registration, login, and password reset functionality. Integrate secure password hashing, JWT token issuance, and rate limiting to protect against brute-force attacks.",
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Users can register with email and password, and the credentials are stored securely using salted bcrypt hashing.",
    "Login validates credentials and returns a signed JWT containing user ID and role, with a configurable expiration time.",
    "Password reset flow sends a time‑limited, single‑use token via email and allows users to set a new password.",
    "Rate limiting is enforced on login and password reset endpoints, returning HTTP 429 after exceeding thresholds."
  ],
  "story_points": 8,
  "priority": "Critical",
  "labels": [
    "authentication",
    "backend",
    "security"
  ],
  "dependencies": [
    "Database schema design for users table"
  ],
  "definition_of_done": "Code merged to main branch, all unit and integration tests passing, security review completed, API documentation updated, and feature deployed to staging environment for QA verification."
}
